id: Integer: the ID for this item

name.name: text: the name of the publisher
name.acronym: text: a short-form for the name
name.language: value(two-letter language code): the language of this value

url: URL: the url of the publisher
country: value(two letter country code): the country of the publisher
notes: text: notes about the publisher record

imprint_of.id: integer: the ID of the imprint
imprint_of.name: text: the name of the imprint
imprint_of.url: URL: the url of the imprint
imprint_of.country: value(two letter country code): the country of the imprint
imprint_of.notes: text: notes about the imprint record
imprint_of.imprint_of_id: integer: the ID of the parent publisher
imprint_of.imprints_id: integer: the ID of the imprints
imprint_of.publication_count: integer: the number of publication records in open policy finder for this imprint
imprint_of.uri: URL: the address within open policy finder of the imprint

imprints.id: integer: the ID of the imprint
imprints.name: text: the name of the imprint
imprints.url: URL: the url of the imprint
imprints.country: value(two letter country code): the country of the imprint
imprints.notes: text: notes about the imprint record
imprints.imprint_of_id: integer: the ID of the parent publisher
imprints.imprints_id: integer: the ID of the imprints
imprints.publication_count: integer: the number of publication records in open policy finder for this imprint
imprints.uri: URL: the address within open policy finder of the imprint

policies.id: integer: the ID of the policy
policies.internal_moniker: text: internal moniker for the policy
policies.publication_count: integer: the number of publication records in open policy finder for this policy
policies.permitted_oa: value('yes', 'no'): whether open access is permitted

urls.description: text: description of the document linked to
urls.type: value('policy', 'statement', 'guidance', information'): the type of document
urls.url: URL: the address of the document

policies.open_access_prohibited: value('yes', 'no'): whether open access is prohibited
policies.uri: URL: the address within open policy finder of the policy

publication_count: integer: the number of publication records in open policy finder for this publisher

publications.id: integer: the ID of the publication
publications.title: text: the title of the publication
issns: text: the ISSNs of the publication
publications.uri: URL: the address within open policy finder of the publication
